title: Man stabbed and killed in Thembalethu
description: GEORGE NEWS - A 21-year-old suspect has been...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 21-year-old suspect has been arrested on a charge of murder following a fatal stabbing in Zone 6, Thembalethu, on Sunday 17 November.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, the circumstances surrounding the death are still under investigation.


He said police were called out to the George hospital on Sunday where they found the victim with a stab wound to his chest. "He was declared dead by medical personnel," said Spies.

The suspect is expected to make his first court appearance later this week.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
